## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the problem or gap you've identified.

## Proposed solution
How you'd like it to work.

## Example usage
How a developer would use this feature.

## Which package does this affect?
- [ ] narrative-form-core
- [ ] narrative-form-react
- [ ] narrative-form-angular
- [ ] narrative-form-vue
- [ ] narrative-form-native
- [ ] All

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Any other info, mockups, or references.
